title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
author: D.H. Lawrence
description: Lyric and sensual, D.H. Lawrence’s scandalous novel explores the emotions of a lonely woman trapped in a sterile marriage and her growing love for the robust gamekeeper of her husband’s estate—with an introduction by Kathryn Harrison. The basis for the major motion picture starring The Crown’s Emma Corrin and Unbroken’s Jack O’Connell Inspired by the long-standing affair between D. H. Lawrence’s German wife and an Italian peasant, Lady Chatterley’s Lover follows the intense passions of Constance...
